testSummary: All 28 turbo test tasks green on TWO consecutive COLD runs. Phase-3: ingest 22 (resolve-workspace, ingest-core, durable-boundary unit + api-key-isolation integration), processor 20 + 1 skipped (core, failure-dlq unit; idempotency, ordering-convergence, workspace-isolation integration RAN on real PG; fifo-localstack e2e skipped no LocalStack). Repo total 114 passed + 1 skipped / 21 files. Integration tier confirmed running on real PG localhost:5433.
notes: TDD. validateEnvelope reconstructs only trusted fields so client workspace_id can never flow through; workspace_id solely from workspace_api_keys. Ingest returns 200 ONLY after SQS resolves (deferred-mock ordering), 503 on SQS reject, 400 bad payload (no send), 403 unknown key (no send). FIFO MessageGroupId=profile_id, MessageDeduplicationId=event_id. planProcessing orders profile-upsert BEFORE event-insert (FK ok for progress-first stub); events ON CONFLICT(event_id) DO NOTHING; profiles ON CONFLICT(workspace_id,external_id) merge attrs only on profile_created; buildEventInsert resolves profile_id via (workspace_id,external_id) subquery so event always links same profile (never client value). Handler reports partial batchItemFailures (no ack->redrive->DLQ); unparseable body reported as failure not throw. Processor isolation proven on admin/service-role pool (rolbypassrls=true) via in-code scoping + (workspace_id,external_id) key (NOT SET ROLE to non-BYPASSRLS). Scope discipline: profile_features + segment re-eval are documented no-logic extension points (Phase 4/5). turbo.json unchanged (cache:false). Unique workspace UUID namespaces per integration file.
